rulesetId.description: Must reference an active ruleset from the same bundle.

ranges.description: Required and non-empty. Quantity values must be unique within the ruleset; first quantity should start at 1. Quantity breakpoints should match across all ruleset entries in the same payload.

prices.description: Required when bundle is non-configurable or has priceType. Prohibited when configurable without priceType. Must be non-empty and include exactly one entry per active bundle ruleset. Quantity breakpoints must match across rulesets, start at 1, and be unique within each ruleset.

rulesetId.description: Must reference an active ruleset from the same bundle.

ranges.description: Required and non-empty. Quantity values must be unique within the ruleset; first quantity should start at 1. Quantity breakpoints should match across all ruleset entries in the same payload. Each range should provide amountOff or percentOff (depending on bundle discountType).

discounts.description: Allowed only when bundle is configurable, has discountType, and has no priceType. Must be non-empty and include exactly one entry per active bundle ruleset. Quantity breakpoints must match across rulesets, start at 1, and be unique within each ruleset.

addUnit.description: Buffered format: time unit to offset shipment from billing start (day/week/month, limited by frequencyUnit). Mutually exclusive with unitDay/unitOffset. Only available for adhoc billing

addCount.description: Buffered format: number of addUnit intervals to offset from billing start. Use -1 to ship the day before the next billing cycle. Mutually exclusive with unitDay/unitOffset

unitDay.description: Anchored format: day within the frequency unit to ship on (1–31 for monthly, 1–7 ISO for weekly). Mutually exclusive with addUnit/addCount. Required for anchored billing or adhoc with anchored shipping

unitOffset.description: Anchored format: which iteration within the billing period this shipment belongs to (0 to frequencyCount-1). Mutually exclusive with addUnit/addCount

shippings.description: Required for physical products when type is "subscription". Prohibited for digital products

anchorDate.description: Required for anchored billing with daily frequency. Prohibited for digital products and adhoc plans without anchored shipping

rebillingDay.description: Fixed rebilling marker for daily frequency. Mutually exclusive with rebillingDayOfMonth/rebillingDayOfWeek. Prohibited for digital products

rebillingDayOfMonth.description: Day of month to rebill on for monthly frequency. Mutually exclusive with rebillingDay/rebillingDayOfWeek. Prohibited for digital products

rebillingDayOfWeek.description: ISO day of week to rebill on (1=Mon–7=Sun) for weekly frequency. Mutually exclusive with rebillingDay/rebillingDayOfMonth. Prohibited for digital products

cutOffDays.description: Days before first shipment that acts as preparation deadline. Required for anchored billing plans

cutOffTime.description: Time-of-day deadline for cutoff (HH:MM). Defaults to 23:59 if cutOffDays is set

chargeImmediately.description: Whether to charge on signup. Forced to 1 for adhoc plans. Prohibited for digital products

shipImmediately.description: Whether to ship immediately on signup. Cannot be 1 when chargeImmediately is 0

bufferDays.description: Days after signup before first shipment. Only allowed when shipImmediately is true. Prohibited for digital products

trialPrice.description: Price for trial period. Prohibited for anchored billing plans

trialLengthDays.description: Duration of trial in days. Prohibited for anchored billing plans

trialSingleOrder.description: Whether trial is a single order. Only for adhoc physical plans

commitmentBillingCount.description: Minimum billing cycles before cancellation is allowed

chargesLimit.description: Maximum successful charges before subscription expires
